raw_description:
Somewhere Hotel Al Ahsa provides rooms in Al Ahsa. This 5-star hotel offers a spa experience, with its hot tub and fitness centre. Both free WiFi and private parking are accessible on site.

All rooms in the hotel are equipped with a TV with satellite channels. With a private bathroom fitted with a bath and free toiletries, certain rooms at Somewhere Hotel Al Ahsa also provide guests with a city view. All guest rooms will provide guests with a wardrobe and a kettle.

A continental breakfast can be enjoyed at the property.

Speaking Arabic, English, Hindi and Filipino at the reception, staff are always at hand to help.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.0for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Somewhere Hotel Al Ahsa. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Airport shuttle.
